<!-- Source: HLD §3.2 query pipeline, §7.3 /v1/answer SSE, openapi.yaml. Participants are real HLD components only. -->

# Sequence Diagram — /v1/answer (personal tool, SSE)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor User as Arjun (SPA)
    participant API as API Gateway (FastAPI)
    participant Cache as TOC Cache (LRU)
    participant PG as PostgreSQL
    participant Router as Router Node (Claude 3 Haiku)
    participant Ret as Retrieve Node
    participant QD as Qdrant
    participant Gen as Generate Node (Claude/GPT-4o)
    participant LS as LangSmith

    User->>API: POST /v1/answer {document_id, query} (JWT)
    API->>Cache: get TOC(document_id)
    alt cache miss
        Cache->>PG: load sections
        PG-->>Cache: TOC
    end
    Cache-->>Router: TOC (<10ms on hit)
    API->>Router: route(query, TOC)
    Router->>LS: trace routing
    Router-->>API: RouterOutput {sections[], confidence[], fallback, rationale}
    alt all confidence < 0.5 (fallback)
        API->>Ret: full-document retrieve
    else scoped
        API->>Ret: retrieve section_id IN (selected)
    end
    Ret->>QD: search (payload filter + tenant_id)
    QD-->>Ret: chunks
    Ret-->>Gen: context chunks
    Gen->>LS: trace generation
    loop streamed tokens
        Gen-->>API: token
        API-->>User: event: token (TokenEvent)
    end
    Gen-->>API: completed answer
    API-->>User: event: final (AnswerFinalEvent {answer, citations[], routing{}})
```

> Mirrors HLD §3.2 / §7.3. Router never calls Gen on the routing path; for `/v1/route` the flow stops at RouterOutput.
